name: Default Roast
correct_fast: Even a broken clock is right twice a day.
Your parents must be so relieved.
A monkey with a buzzer could do that.
Don't let it go to your head.
correct_slow: Congrats on the world's slowest correct answer.
Did you have to Google it first?
We were about to move on without you.
wrong: Did you even read the question?
Have you considered a career change?
I've seen better guesses from a random number generator.
Your team owes the audience an apology.
Google would've known that. Oh wait...
timeout: You had ONE job. And a buzzer.
This is the engineering talent Google hired?
nobody: An entire room of engineers. Zero correct answers.
This is going in the postmortem.
Maybe try a coloring book next time.
